# leifwind_project (Resource)

A leifwind metadata project. The name is immutable (changes force replacement).

~> **Note:** project names are globally unique across *all* tenants, not just within your organization (LW-71) — this is intended, a consequence of the schema-per-project design (each project maps to its own Postgres schema, and schema names are database-global). Pick project names accordingly, e.g. by namespacing them per organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "leifwind_project" "library" {
  name = "library"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Project name. Immutable (changes force replacement). Globally unique across all tenants — see the resource description above.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server-assigned object id (UUID).
- `unique_key` (String) Server-computed natural key (for projects: equals the name).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import leifwind_project.library 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000
```
